calendar.description: Senate Judiciary, Law Enforcement, and Criminal Justice Hearing

general_provisions: This bill amends the Government Data Privacy Act and the Government Records Access and Management Act.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>defines terms;<hr><ltbullet>restructures the Utah Privacy Commission (commission) to include representatives from state agencies, cities, counties, and public education;<hr><ltbullet>transfers support of the commission from the state auditor's office to the Utah Office of Data Privacy (office);<hr><ltbullet>authorizes the commission to establish participation requirements for commission members;<hr><ltbullet>authorizes the office to provide recommendations and guidance;<hr><ltbullet>authorizes the office to partner with state institutions of higher education for research and support functions;<hr><ltbullet>requires the office and the commission to jointly study the use of passive data collection technology by governmental entities and report findings and recommendations to the Government Operations Interim Committee;<hr><ltbullet>establishes the data privacy ombudsman as a component of the Office of Data Privacy;<hr><ltbullet>establishes a data privacy complaint process;<hr><ltbullet>removes duplicative provisions from the Government Records Access and Management Act;<hr><ltbullet>expands amendment and correction procedures to cover information beyond personal data; <hr><ltbullet>removes the state privacy auditor, and places the state privacy auditor's responsibility with the state auditor's office and makes conforming changes; and<hr><ltbullet>makes technical and conforming changes.
